assertion_results.text: A SKILL.md file exists in the output skill directory
The SKILL.md has valid YAML frontmatter with name and description fields
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 1-4: YAML frontmatter delimited by --- with name: git-commit-helper and a description field present.

assertion_results.text: The name field uses only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens
assertion_results.evidence: name: git-commit-helper — contains only lowercase letters and hyphens, no uppercase, spaces, or special characters.

assertion_results.text: The description includes 'Use when' trigger conditions
assertion_results.evidence: Description contains literal 'Use when writing commit messages, committing code, preparing git commits, or when the user mentions conventional commits...'.

assertion_results.text: The SKILL.md body contains a numbered workflow or step-by-step instructions
assertion_results.evidence: Five numbered steps: '### 1. Gather staged changes', '### 2. Detect monorepo scope', '### 3. Determine commit type', '### 4. Write the commit message', '### 5. Present and confirm'.

assertion_results.text: A scripts/ directory exists with at least one Bun TypeScript script (.ts file)
assertion_results.evidence: scripts/parse-diff.ts exists — a .ts file with #!/usr/bin/env bun shebang (571 lines).

assertion_results.text: The script includes a --help flag or usage documentation
assertion_results.evidence: Line 435: if (args.includes('--help') || args.includes('-h')) { console.log(HELP); process.exit(0); } — --help flag implemented in source code.

assertion_results.text: An evals/evals.json file exists with at least 2 test cases
assertion_results.evidence: evals/evals.json exists with 3 test cases (ids 1, 2, 3) covering monorepo feat, root-level fix, and CI/build changes.

assertion_results.text: The SKILL.md body includes a Common mistakes or pitfalls section
assertion_results.evidence: Line 179: '## Common mistakes' section with an 8-row table covering past tense, capitalization, scope, type misuse, etc.

assertion_results.text: The SKILL.md body is under 500 lines
assertion_results.evidence: SKILL.md is 212 lines total, well under the 500-line limit.

assertion_results.text: The script uses structured JSON output to stdout
assertion_results.evidence: Line 567: console.log(JSON.stringify(result, null, 2)) — uses JSON.stringify to write structured ParseResult object to stdout.
